combined_text: Ice Cube, Iverson starting 3-on-3 hoops league with former pros "Ice Cube, Iverson starting 3-on-3 hoops league with former pros BIG3 expected to begin June 24Doug Feinberg · The Associated Press · January 11, 2017Former NBA player Allen Iverson, left, shows his jersey as he poses with entertainer Ice Cube at the announcement to launch the BIG3, a new 3-on-3 pro
